explanation: Inserted extra spaces and used double backslash to obfuscate the path slightly while maintaining valid syntax.
Wrapped the registry path in quotes to test parsing behavior and ensure the command is still valid.
Reordered the /f flag to test if the command still triggers the rule when the order is changed.
Used lowercase 'hklm' instead of uppercase to test case sensitivity in the detection rule.
Replaced 'CurrentControlSet' with its equivalent 'ControlSet001' to test path normalization evasion.
Used an environment variable to represent part of the registry path to test dynamic evasion techniques.
